title: Hhverse 3 Pcs Spray Bottles 500ml Water Spray Bottle for Hair with Two Types of Misting Head Plastic Refillable Empty Water Sprayer for Gardening Cleaning Hairdressing
features: 🪟【High Quality Materials】:You will get 3 Pcs 500ml spray bottles and a replacement nozzle. The spray bottle is made of high-quality PET. The thickened material is not easy to deform, it is non-toxic, tasteless, environmentally friendly, leak proof, durable, and reusable.

🪟【Different Types of Nozzles】:There are 4 nozzles in total, one of which is Pure atomizing nozzle. The spray is more delicate and fully covered, this nozzle is especially protective for seedlings. The other three are adjustable nozzles that can be adjusted to fine mist and fixed jet modes; You can use them according to your daily needs.
🪟【Leak Proof Design】:The threaded design of the bottle mouth ensures good sealing, the inner lid is equipped with a sealing ring, so even if you tilt or shake, no water droplets will leak out.

🪟【Easy to Use】:Our plastic mist spray bottle are ergonomically designed, with easy to press nozzles and smooth water and mist discharge. The bottle is green，transparent, you can see how many liquid left clearly.

🪟【Widely Used】:They can hold various liquids, such as water, alcohol disinfectants, bleach, etc. It can be used both indoors and outdoors, perfect for watering plants, hair salons, pet cleaning, home cleaning, hotel cleaning, outdoor work, and so on.
description: Product Description The package includes: 3 plastic spray bottles 1 spare nozzle Specification: Material:High quality PET Colour:Transparent Green Capacity:500ml True Fine Mist Instead of Spray, Ultra Even Mist Reusable fine mist travel party barbershop kitchen bathroom cleaning hair salon refillable trigger sprayer Perfect for seedlings, small garden, indoor plants, young plants and without flooding them. Adjustable nozzle, two modes, three states. The nozzle can rotate, adjust and close, strong DC, and spray three modes, which can be used for daily hair salon plant irrigation household cleaning.
